name: Peachtree Sporting Club
about: Peachtree Sporting Club is an upcoming entertainment venue in Atlanta scheduled to open in early 2026. It combines sports, gaming, gourmet food, and craft cocktails to create an immersive entertainment experience. The facility features a 20-foot video wall, 7 state-of-the-art virtual sports bays, and a vibrant social atmosphere designed for watching, playing, and celebrating. It caters to various activities including NFL watch parties, corporate events, and virtual golf, with options for semi-private lounges and full venue buyouts.
why_golfers_like_it: 7 state-of-the-art virtual sports bays for immersive gameplay
Premium technology with a massive 20-foot video wall for enhanced viewing
Upscale social atmosphere combining golf with entertainment and dining
Ideal for both solo practice and group events like watch parties

faq.answer: No, the venue offers gourmet food and craft cocktails on-site.

faq.answer: Not specified. The focus appears to be on adult-oriented events and corporate hospitality.
